title: Feira de Santana, BA — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Feira de Santana is a city in BA with a population of 624,783. Bahia’s second-largest city and a major commercial hub, known for its large open-air market and central role in regional trade.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
